determinism.seed_policy: Each final model seed initializes Python, NumPy, PyTorch, and CUDA random generators with its own declared seed.

portability_note: Paths rewritten project-root-relative from the frozen original in configs/frozen/.

selection_protocol.mask_randomisation: Fixed deterministic corruption seed derived only from split_name, target_start, scenario_identifier, and model_seed. Epoch number is excluded.
selection_protocol.selection_criterion: Global raw-speed MAE aggregated across all valid future targets from the three fixed selection scenarios.
selection_protocol.target_policy: Artificial corruption applies only to historical native-observed entries. Future target masks and values remain unchanged.

supersedes.reason: Protocol v1 changed selection corruption masks across epochs because epoch_number was included in selection-mask randomisation. Protocol v2 fixes selection masks for every selection target start and scenario across all epochs.

training_protocol_note: Training corruption remains epoch-dependent to implement the failure curriculum. Selection corruption is strictly fixed across epochs.

window_contract.target_policy: Native future targets are retained. Artificial corruption is applied only to historical native-observed entries.
